sections.paragraph:
- Original: εὐρύχωρος

- Transliteration: Euruchoros

- Phonetic: yoo-roo'-kho-ros

- Definition:

1. spacious, broad

- Origin: from eurus (wide) and G5561

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From εὐρύς eurus (wide) and G5561; spacious: - broad.
